# Jordan Candidate

Veterinary receptionist with experience managing appointment books, client intake, EFTPOS payments, phone triage, and urgent visit coordination.

Recent work includes coordinating patient arrivals, updating practice management records, processing insurance paperwork, handling vaccination reminders, and communicating calmly with distressed pet owners.

Core strengths include front desk workflow ownership, accurate billing, client communication, clinical team coordination, and careful handling of sensitive patient and owner information.
